parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: '{ issues(filter: { team: { id: { eq: "a545ae90-ba50-4427-83e6-c0ce7dde9528" } }, state: { type: { nin: ["completed", "cancelled"] } } }, first: 250) { nodes { id } } }' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const nodes = $input.first().json.data?.issues?.nodes ?? [];
const count = nodes.length;

const messages = [
  "Somewhere, a developer is refreshing their PR page for the 47th time today. {count} PRs are waiting for your eyes. Run `/roll` today — they'll finally sleep tonight.",
  "Each community PR reviewed = one open source contributor who doesn't quit forever. {count} are waiting. Run `/roll` and keep the dream alive.",
  "Fun fact: {count} community PRs were written with love, caffeine, and questionable commit messages. Show them some love — give `/roll` a spin today.",
  "The universe is vast and cold. But {count} community PRs are warm and ready for review. Be the warmth — type `/roll` today.",
  "Legend says every unreviewed PR adds a year to a contributor's waiting time. {count} legends are unfolding. Run `/roll` and break the curse.",
  "Scientists confirm: reviewing a community PR boosts reviewer karma by 47%. {count} PRs available. Run `/roll` for maximum karma.",
  "{count} community PRs walk into a bar. The bartender says 'we don't serve PRs here.' Don't be that bartender — run `/roll` and serve them well.",
  "Plot twist: the community PR you review today might fix the bug that's been annoying you for months. {count} candidates. Run `/roll` to find out.",
  "Each time a community PR gets reviewed, a developer somewhere finally sleeps soundly. {count} developers are still awake. Run `/roll` and send them to bed.",
  "Unreviewed PRs don't disappear — they just get sadder. {count} of them are feeling existential right now. Run `/roll` and give one a reason to smile.",
  "A community contributor submitted a PR and went to make coffee. They've been back for hours. {count} PRs, still waiting. Run `/roll` — the coffee's getting cold.",
  "Every great open source project was built on reviewed PRs and broken dreams. Help with the first part — {count} are waiting. Run `/roll` today.",
  "Ghost stories for developers: {count} PRs, submitted months ago, never reviewed, drifting through the codebase... Run `/roll` before they start haunting us.",
  "In a parallel universe, every community PR gets reviewed in 24 hours. {count} waiting here. Run `/roll` and make this universe a little more like that one.",
  "Reviewing a community PR has been scientifically linked to: good vibes, better karma, and at least one contributor not rage-quitting open source. {count} available — run `/roll` for science.",
  "If {count} PRs were pizza slices, that'd be a lot of cold pizza. Run `/roll` and heat one up before it's too late.",
  "A contributor pushed their first ever PR to Strapi. It's in that pile of {count}. Run `/roll` — be the reason they come back.",
  "The PR queue has {count} items. The coffee machine has 0 excuses. Pour a cup and run `/roll`.",
  "Somewhere a contributor is telling their rubber duck 'don't worry, they'll review it soon.' The duck is skeptical. {count} PRs. Prove the duck wrong — run `/roll`.",
  "Community PRs are like plants — ignore them long enough and they die. {count} are looking thirsty. Run `/roll` and water one today.",
  "Breaking news: {count} community PRs found waiting patiently in Linear. Experts recommend running `/roll` as immediate treatment.",
  "Every unreviewed PR is a tiny cry for help wrapped in a diff. {count} tiny cries. Run `/roll` and answer one.",
  "A contributor spent their weekend on a PR. You could spend 20 minutes on it. {count} are waiting — run `/roll` and make that trade.",
  "Fun activity: pick a PR, review it, feel like a hero. {count} opportunities right now. Start with `/roll`.",
  "The Strapi community has spoken — in code. {count} times. Time to write back — run `/roll` to start the conversation.",
  "{count} PRs. One `/roll`. Somewhere, a butterfly effect of merged code begins. Be that butterfly.",
  "Archaeologists in 3024 will discover {count} unreviewed PRs and wonder what went wrong. Don't give them the satisfaction — run `/roll` today.",
  "You ever just want to make someone's day? There are {count} contributors hoping you will. Run `/roll` and pick one.",
  "The queue doesn't clear itself. Trust me, we checked. {count} PRs, zero self-reviewing. Someone's gotta run `/roll` — might as well be you.",
  "Plot twist: you ARE the senior dev contributors are hoping will review their PR. {count} are counting on you. Run `/roll` and live up to it.",
  "Community PRs are the love language of open source. {count} messages of love, unread. Run `/roll` and write back.",
  "Every merged community PR is a tiny victory for the open web. {count} victories are pending. Run `/roll` and claim one.",
  "A wise person once said: 'be the reviewer you wish to see in the world.' {count} PRs are waiting. Run `/roll` and be that person.",
  "Studies show teams who review community PRs are 100% cooler than those who don't. {count} chances to be cooler — run `/roll`.",
  "Somewhere a contributor refreshed their PR page again. And again. {count} PRs. End the refresh loop — run `/roll`.",
  "Hot take: the best part of open source is the community. The second best part is reviewing their PRs. {count} waiting — run `/roll` and enjoy both.",
  "If you review a PR in the forest and no one hears it, does the contributor still get a notification? Yes. {count} waiting. Run `/roll` and let them know.",
  "Time is a flat circle. The PR queue is not — it has {count} items and it grows. Run `/roll` before it becomes a sphere.",
  "Each community PR reviewed = one less developer switching to a competitor's framework. {count} on the edge. Run `/roll` and keep them here.",
  "The gap between 'submitted' and 'reviewed' is where open source dreams go to question themselves. {count} PRs. Run `/roll` and close the gap.",
  "Not all heroes wear capes. Some just run `/roll` and review a PR. {count} heroic moments available right now.",
  "Contributors who get their PR reviewed are 3× more likely to submit another one. {count} future contributors waiting on you — run `/roll`.",
  "The PR queue is judging us silently. {count} items deep. Run `/roll` and show it who's boss.",
  "Dear diary: today I ran `/roll`, reviewed a PR, and felt genuinely good about it. {count} diary entries waiting to be written.",
  "Confession: {count} PRs have been waiting longer than your last Netflix binge. Run `/roll` — you owe them at least one episode's worth of attention.",
  "What if the real treasure was the community PRs we reviewed along the way? {count} treasures await. Run `/roll` and start digging.",
  "In the time it took to read this message, a contributor hit refresh again. {count} PRs. Run `/roll` before the next one.",
  "A PR a day keeps the stale queue away. {count} options today — run `/roll` and pick yours.",
  "Open source runs on caffeine and reviewed PRs. The caffeine's covered. {count} PRs need you — run `/roll` and pull your weight.",
  "The community built something and trusted us with it. {count} times over. Run `/roll` and show up for them."
];

const text = messages[Math.floor(Math.random() * messages.length)]
  .replace('{count}', String(count));

return [{ json: { slackResponse: { response_type: 'in_channel', text } } }];
